basic_details.job_title: STPI Apprentice Trainee Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 15 Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Software Technology Parks of India (STPI) has officially announced the Apprentice Trainee Recruitment 2026 with 15 vacancies. The detailed notification was published on 22nd April 2026 at stpi.in . Candidates who meet the age criteria of 18 to 32 years and hold B.Tech/B.E., Diploma, B.Com, or B.A. qualifications can now submit their online applications from 22nd April 2026 to 11th May 2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply online are shared below.

important_dates.nats portal registration: Must be completed before applying on STPI portal (https://nats.education.gov.in)

application_fee.details: The official notification does not mention any application fee for applying for STPI Apprentice Trainee Recruitment 2026. The online application through STPI's web portal (www.stpi.in) is free of cost. Similarly, registration on the NATS Portal (https://nats.education.gov.in) is also free. Candidates are advised to apply only through the official portals and not through any third-party website or agency. Be cautious of any individual or platform demanding a fee for application processing or selection facilitation - STPI does not charge any fee for this recruitment.

age_limit.details: The minimum age for all candidates is 18 years as on 11/05/2026. The maximum age limit differs by category - Unreserved (UR/General) candidates must not exceed 27 years, OBC candidates must not exceed 30 years, and SC/ST candidates must not exceed 32 years, all calculated as on 11/05/2026. Age relaxation is in line with Government of India rules for reserved categories.

vacancy_details.Degree / Diploma / Discipline: B.Tech / B.E. in: Electronics / Electricals / Electronics & Communications / Telecommunications / Computer Science / Information Technology
vacancy_details.Location of Vacancies in STPI Centres: 02 – Bengaluru | 01 – Bhubaneswar | 01 – Chennai | 01 – Guwahati | 01 – Gurugram | 01 – Hyderabad | 01 – Noida

vacancy_details.Degree / Diploma / Discipline: Diploma in: Electronics / Electricals / Electronics & Communications / Telecommunications / Computer Science / Information Technology OR Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com) / Bachelor of Arts (B.A.)

salary_details.details: Selected Apprentice Trainees will receive a monthly stipend as per the qualification category. B.Tech/B.E. degree holders will receive Rs. 15,000/- per month, Diploma holders will receive Rs. 10,900/- per month, and B.A./B.Com degree holders will receive Rs. 12,300/- per month. | The stipend will be facilitated through the Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) mechanism - the Government's admissible share of the stipend will be directly credited to the apprentice's bank account through the NATS portal after successful DBT registration. | Candidates must ensure their bank account details (account number, IFSC code, bank name) are accurately entered during NATS portal registration, as any error may delay or prevent stipend disbursement. This is a training stipend and not a salary - no other allowances or service benefits are associated with the apprenticeship engagement.

selection_process: Stage 1: NATS Portal Registration Candidates must register on https://nats.education.gov.in and obtain a NATS Enrolment ID before applying. Bank details must be entered for DBT stipend processing.
Stage 2: Online Application on STPI Portal Apply online on www.stpi.in (Career Section) on or before 11/05/2026. Enter the NATS Enrolment ID in the application form.
Stage 3: Shortlisting Applications screened based on eligibility criteria - qualification, discipline, age, and NATS registration.
Stage 4: Interview Shortlisted candidates called for interview. Final selection based on marks obtained in the interview.
how_to_apply: The application process is entirely online - only online applications through STPI's web portal will be accepted; no offline, postal, or email applications will be considered. Before applying on the STPI portal, candidates must mandatorily register on the NATS Portal (https://nats.education.gov.in) and obtain their unique NATS Enrolment ID, which is required to be entered in the STPI online application form.

Keep all educational certificates, identity documents, and bank account details ready before starting the NATS registration. After successful NATS registration, visit STPI's official website www.stpi.in, go to the Career Section, and complete the online application before 11/05/2026. Candidates are advised to apply well in advance and not wait until the last date to avoid technical difficulties.
Step 1: Register on the NATS Portal at https://nats.education.gov.in and obtain your unique NATS Enrolment ID (refer to Annexure A in the notification for step-by-step instructions).
Step 2: Visit STPI's official website www.stpi.in → Career Section.
Step 3: Fill in the online application form with all required details including the NATS Enrolment ID.
Step 4: Upload required documents as specified in the application form.
Step 5: Submit the online application on or before 11/05/2026.
Step 6: Take a printout of the submitted application form for future reference.
important_instructions: Only online applications through www.stpi.in (Career Section) will be accepted. NATS Portal registration at https://nats.education.gov.in is mandatory before applying on STPI portal. Qualification must have been completed in April 2021 or thereafter. Candidates who have already completed apprenticeship anywhere are not eligible. Reservation as per Govt. of India rules: preference to 3-OBC, 2-SC, 1-ST out of 15 posts. Stipend paid through DBT via NATS portal - ensure bank details are correctly entered during NATS registration. Applications received after 11/05/2026 will not be considered under any circumstances.

faq.question: Q1. What is STPI Apprentice Trainee Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: STPI Apprentice Trainee Recruitment 2026 is a training engagement drive by Software Technology Parks of India (under MeitY) to recruit 15 Apprentice Trainees for one year under the Apprenticeship Act, 1961 across various STPI centres.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in STPI Apprentice Trainee 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 15 Apprentice Trainee vacancies have been announced, including 8 posts for B.Tech/B.E degree holders and 7 posts for Diploma/B.Com/B.A candidates.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to apply online for STPI Apprentice Trainee Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for STPI Apprentice Trainee Recruitment 2026 through the official STPI portal is 11 May 2026, and applications after this date will not be considered.

faq.question: Q4. At which locations will STPI Apprentice Trainees be posted?
faq.answer: Apprentice Trainee positions are available at multiple STPI centres including Bengaluru, Bhubaneswar, Chennai, Guwahati, Gurugram, Hyderabad, Noida, Mohali and Pune, as per the discipline‑wise and location‑wise vacancy breakup in the notification.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for STPI Apprentice Trainee 2026?
faq.answer: Eligible disciplines include B.Tech/B.E in Electronics, Electricals, E&C, Telecommunication, Computer Science or IT, Diploma in the same technical branches, and non‑technical B.Com or B.A degrees, provided the qualification is completed in April 2021 or later.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for STPI Apprentice Trainee Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must be at least 18 years old and not more than 27 years (UR), 30 years (OBC) or 32 years (SC/ST) as on 11 May 2026, with age relaxations applicable as per Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for STPI Apprentice Trainee 2026?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for STPI Apprentice Trainee Recruitment 2026; both the online application on the STPI portal and NATS portal registration are completely free for all categories.

faq.question: Q8. What is the monthly stipend for STPI Apprentice Trainee 2026?
faq.answer: B.Tech/B.E graduates will receive a stipend of ₹15,000 per month, Diploma holders will get ₹10,900 per month, and B.A/B.Com graduates will receive ₹12,300 per month during the one‑year apprenticeship.
